category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vfox as a version manager for Java, Node.js, Flutter, .NET, and more.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vfox; source_facts.homepage points to the official vfox site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official vfox site; official vfox docs include Introduction and Quick Start pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/version-fox/vfox, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names version management and supported runtimes; source_facts.executables lists the vfox CLI.
